name: LLR Trace to HLR
description: Low-level requirements (software design) are developed from, and trace to, high-level requirements.
rationale: DO-178C Table A-2 obj 4-5 & A-4 obj 6: low-level requirements and architecture are developed from high-level requirements, traceable through the lineage.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
